507],[279,565,1776530698531],[279,566,1776530698559],[280,566,1776530698570],[280,566,1776530698571],[282,564,1776530698584],[284,560,1776530698599],[289,555,1776530698610],[295,550,1776530698624],[300,546,1776530698634],[304,544,1776530698647],[306,542,1776530698664],[305,542,1776530698667],[304,543,1776530698675],[303,543,1776530698689],[301,544,1776530698699],[300,545,1776530698705],[298,545,1776530698715],[297,546,1776530698723],[297,547,1776530698750],[297,549,1776530698780],[297,550,1776530698787],[297,551,1776530698803],[298,552,1776530698810],[298,553,1776530698816],[298,554,1776530698822],[298,555,1776530698837],[298,556,1776530698848],[298,557,1776530698855],[297,557,1776530698877],[297,558,1776530698891],[296,558,1776530698898],[296,559,1776530698917],[295,559,1776530698927],[295,560,1776530698954],[294,560,1776530698967]],"mm-mp":17.974276527331188,"md":[[298,546,1776530698736]],"md-mp":3723.5,"mu":[[298,546,1776530698866]],"mu-mp":3738.0},"v":1,"tc":{}}
